# CWE-613: Insufficient Session Expiration
lang: go
file: CWE-613-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var revokedSessions = map[string]struct{}{}

// Vulnerable: session cookie never expires and logout does not invalidate server-side state.
func LoginHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	sid := c.PostForm("session_id")
	c.SetCookie("sid", sid, 0, "/", "", false, true)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}

func LogoutHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	c.SetCookie("sid", "", -1, "/", "", false, true)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}

func ProtectedHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	sid, err := c.Cookie("sid")
	if err != nil || sid == "" {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	_ = time.Now()
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"data": "secret"})
}
